title: Master of Etiquette
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Master of Etiquette''' was the title given to [[Kuati/Legends|Kuati]] officials who were charged with working with the ruling families to ensure that the laws which control the leadership of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] were obeyed at all times.

==Appearances==
*''[[Slave Ship]]''
